abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: "It Belongs In A Museum!"
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1 while it is within 4" of a Remains marker.

actions.name: Defy the Odds
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of (melee)2" or (gun)12". If this action receives a raise, another ally within 10" of this model may either attach an Artifact upgrade or declare the Interact action.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Treasure Trove
actions.effects: Make a Remains marker within range. Then, enemy models within (melee)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 12 Wp duel or gain a Slow token.

actions.name: Whip Vault
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Choose a piece of blocking terrain within range.
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range in base contact with the chosen piece of terrain.

triggers.name: "Take What You Can Carry!"
triggers.text: Allies within (melee)2" of this model gain a Replica token.

triggers.name: Jackpot!
triggers.text: Attach an Artifact upgrade to this model.

triggers.name: Sudden Strike
triggers.text: This model may declare a (melee) action.

actions.name: Cut and Run
actions.effects: Make a Remains marker in base contact with this model, then move this model up to its Sp.
